mapper.select: SELECT * FROM regions WHERE parent_code = #{parentCode} AND is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM regions WHERE level = #{level} AND is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regions (name, code, parent_code, level, pinyin, lng, lat, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{parentCode}, #{level}, #{pinyin}, #{lng}, #{lat}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
